name: INNOVATIVE FOOD HOLDINGS INC
business: IVFH sells specialty foods including gourmet cheese, meat, produce, and premium ingredients to professional chefs. They distribute through local delivery in Chicago and Denver, national e-commerce on Amazon.com and their own website, and drop-ship arrangements through broadline distributors like US Foods.

exposures.sentence: We distribute these products directly to Professional Chefs in Chicago through our subsidiary, Artisan Specialty Foods, Inc., and nationally through our e-commerce businesses on Amazon.com and our own website.
Our logistics team manages the shipping and delivery process of every package to ensure timely delivery of products to our customers.
Products are sold under both the vendor’s brands and various Company-owned brands.

Computer system disruption and cyber security attacks or a data breach could damage our relationships with our customers, harm our reputation, expose us to litigation and adversely affect our business.

catalysts.event: Sale of real property in Mountaintop, Pennsylvania closed with gross proceeds of $9.225 million.
catalysts.sentence: The sale closed on March 6, 2026, at which time Innovative Properties received gross proceeds of $9.225 million.

catalysts.event: Repayment of MapleMark Bank loan in full.
catalysts.sentence: subsequent to year end, the Company repaid the MapleMark Bank loan in full on March 6, 2026
